_about: FC boost-regulator OUTPUT loop: from boost VOUT (REG-FC pin 13) to its nearest output cap (C4A-FC pad 1, VOUT-FC), return through the continuous bottom GND plane. Mirror of config_vout_bt.json on the fuel-cell side. Coordinates in board mm, from the PnP file + the VOUT-FC net flood-fill (see out/vout_fc_region.png and out/fc_gnd_region.png).

forward._note: A point on the VOUT-FC pour (orange in out/vout_fc_region.png).

return._note: A point on the continuous bottom GND plane (confirmed present under the FC loop; the small slots are bottom-trace clearances the mesher bridges).

_terminal_note: Port at the boost OUTPUT pin EDGE (REG-FC VOUT, where copper exits the IC = closest external point): A on VOUT-FC, B on the GND plane directly beneath. This excludes the IC's internal pin and measures the external PCB loop only.

closure._note: Cap C4A-FC pad 1: VOUT-FC shorts to the GND plane through the cap (loop turnaround).

freq._note: extra includes 500kHz = the regulator switching frequency.
